---
title: "07. 军争、九变与机动变通"
subtitle: "Maneuver, Variation, and Adaptive Tactics"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 7
categories: [sunzi, cultural, omega]
description: "How 军争 and 九变 turn maneuver into state-dependent control, where local turns and layered compatibility matter more than rigid plans."
---

**Chapters:** 军争第七, 九变第八  
**Omega Directions:** `dynamical systems`, `fold operator`, `modular tower inverse limit`

{{< include articles/category_07_maneuver_variation_adaptive_tactics.md >}}

---

[Back to Sunzi Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
